final_choice.row_label: Costs of goods and services sold

variables.notes: R.nc. Candidate list appears to miss the most semantically correct COGS label: 'Costs of goods and services sold', which is present in the income statement and should be preferred for recent years. Added 'Raw materials and finished goods' as a fallback for earlier years when reporting style changed. Manual review flagged because selection uses a row outside the provided candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Costs of goods and services sold
